positive: A highly stylized, central composition illustration featuring mythical bioluminescent flora and celestial elements—such as crescent moons, drifting nebulae dust, and oversized abstract leaves. The art style should be a modern blend of Art Deco linework and stained-glass etching, providing strong, crisp silhouettes and high contrast. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, iridescent gold, and deep forest green. The composition must be clean, perfectly symmetrical, and suitable for printing on apparel, with smooth gradients and distinct, graphic edges. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, vector quality.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, artifact, text, watermark, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, sketch, realistic photo, grayscale, messy, poor composition
